goal: Fix remaining visible mojibake-like user-facing strings in src/renderer/src/App.tsx, especially around layout, window, popout, and modal UI, while keeping the change tightly scoped.
constraints: Change only user-facing strings that are visibly malformed or mojibake-like.
Do not refactor behavior or change logic beyond what is needed for the text cleanup.
Prefer ASCII-safe replacements like ae/oe/ue if there is any encoding risk.
Run a relevant local check if practical.
success_criteria: Visible malformed App.tsx UI strings are corrected.
A relevant local check is reported.
